name: FLUX.1 Schnell official
description: Flux-schnell is the fastest image generation model from Black Forest Labs, tailored for local development and personal use. It is a high-performing model that can generate high-quality images from text descriptions quickly. Compared to similar models like flux-pro and flux-dev, flux-schnell prioritizes speed over some advanced capabilities, making it a great choice for personal projects and rapid prototyping.
